reaction: p + p → p + p + p + p̄  (fixed target, one proton at rest; baryon-number conservation forces an extra proton ⇒ 4 baryons final state)

derivation.threshold_condition: s_min = (4 m_p c²)²  (all 4 final particles at rest in the CM frame)
derivation.fixed_target_s: s = (E_beam + m_p c²)² − (p_beam c)² = 2 m_p c² E_beam + 2 (m_p c²)²
derivation.solve: set s = (4 m_p c²)² ⇒ E_beam,th = 7 m_p c²
derivation.result_kinetic_threshold: T_th = E_beam,th − m_p c² = 6 m_p c²

closed_form.identity: T_th = 6 m_p c² ; E_beam,th = 7 m_p c²

numeric.codata_note: m_p c² = 938.272 MeV (CODATA); T_th = 6 × 938.272 = 5629.632 MeV ≈ 5.63 GeV; total beam E ≈ 6.57 GeV

runs.claim: pair_threshold_factor(1) = 6  (exact factor-6 kinetic-threshold identity T_th = 6 m_p c²)

runs.verdict_verbatim: 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL  (hexa-native libm-class recompute, TECS-L n6-rep Tier2)
🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL  (hexa-native libm-class recompute, TECS-L n6-rep Tier2)

negative_controls: hexa verify --expr pair_threshold_factor 1 5 → 🔴 FALSIFIED (calc=6 != 5) — confirms deterministic, not rubber-stamped
verify.atlas_registered: @F verified-pair_threshold_factor-1 = pair_threshold_factor(1) = 6  (folded into compiler/atlas/embedded.gen.hexa SSOT via hexa atlas register --from-verify)

scope_caveats: Closed-form + numeric threshold reproduction only; target-yield (Lambertson / cross-section) NOT covered here — separate ①생성 yield cell.
Non-wet-lab verify per @D d5; actual antiproton production is downstream confirmation.
